political.s: FEC: $59K PAC donations; 94% to Republican, 6% to Democratic committees.  [CA CalAccess + NY COELIG + TX Ethics adds state-level totals.]

charity.s: $312M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.21% of revenue) via JPMorgan Chase Foundation. JUST Capital JUST 100 — ranked #44 of Russell 1000 (2025) for treatment of workers, customers, communities, environment. Fortune World's Most Admired Companies — ranked #6 (2024). Newsweek Most Trustworthy Companies in America — ranked #19 (2024). Operates the Jpmorgan Chase Foundation: $194.4M in charitable contributions, gifts & grants paid (FY2023, IRS Form 990-PF).
charity.focus: Workforce readiness, small business, financial capability, community development, affordable housing

environment.s: Banking on Climate Chaos 2024: $430.9B in fossil-fuel financing 2016-2023 (#1 globally).

dei.s: HRC Corporate Equality Index: 100/100 — Equality 100 Leader (2025). Top-rated LGBTQ+ workplace policies, benefits, and culture. JUST Capital JUST 100 — ranked #44 of Russell 1000 (2025) for treatment of workers, customers, communities, environment. Bloomberg Gender-Equality Index member (2024) — transparent on female leadership, equal pay, inclusive culture. HRC Corporate Equality Index 100/100 (2025) — top-tier LGBTQ+ workplace equality rating.

privacy.s: 1 publicly-disclosed data breach per Have I Been Pwned (2014) — 76M accounts compromised. Most recent: JPMorgan Chase (2014).

execPay.s: SEC litigation releases: 8 on record (insider trading, accounting fraud, or disclosure violations).

wiki.industry: financial sector, financial services, economics of banking
wiki.extract: JPMorgan Chase & Co. is an American multinational banking institution headquartered in New York City and incorporated in Delaware. It is the largest bank in the United States, and the world's largest bank by market capitalization as of 2026. As the largest of the Big Four banks in America, the firm is considered systemically important by the Financial Stability Board. Its size and scale have often led to enhanced regulatory oversight as well as the development of an internal "Fortress Balance Sheet".
